text:
Created attachment 240603
Patch 10.0.3 to 10.0.6

This is a patch release of www/glpi  from 10.0.3 to 10.0.6.

This is a security release (17 security fixes, 3 with high risk level).

ChangeLog:

- https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/releases/tag/10.0.6
- https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/releases/tag/10.0.5
- https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/releases/tag/10.0.4

Also attached the Poudriere testport logs.
